projectContext.name: Solo CEO launch
goals: Research channels before recommending paid tools
constraints: Ask before sending email or posting publicly

feedback.message: The agent should not call me all the time. It should batch non-critical updates into the end of day report.
If information is out of date, research first and explain source quality.

candidateTools.name: Apify Actor Search
candidateTools.description: Search Apify Store for actors without running them.

candidateTools.name: Apify Actor Run
candidateTools.description: Run selected Apify actors and spend credits.
